title: Treasure Map Gives Loot
description: Right-clicking buried treasure maps now directly gives buried treasure loot.
body:
**I am so sorry - I accidentally updated the wrong version files a few months ago which broke the whole pack on 1.21.2+. This is all fixed as of 7th December 2025.**

Some simple code that changes Buried Treasure maps so that instead of searching the entire world, right clicking with the map instantly gives the player Buried Treasure loot (thus deleting the Buried Treasure Map).

Primarily meant for custom maps where lag is caused by this, but also for convenience.
